task_completion.description: Locate the correct inventory item in HospitalRun.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HospitalRun inventory list or item view showing 'Disposable Surgical Gloves - Large' or cross-reference 'GLV-LG-001' selected or visible.

task_completion.description: Open the form to record a new purchase for the item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Purchase', 'Add Purchase', or 'Add Inventory' form/modal is open specifically for the 'Disposable Surgical Gloves - Large' item.

task_completion.description: Enter the vendor, date received, and invoice number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The purchase form shows 'MedLine Industries' in the Vendor field, '01/15/2025' in the Date Received field, and 'INV-ML-20241115' in the Invoice No field.

task_completion.description: Enter the quantity, cost, lot number, expiration date, and location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The purchase form shows Quantity '500', Purchase Cost '625', Lot Number 'LOT-2024-0847', Expiration Date '06/30/2026', and Location 'Main Warehouse'.

task_completion.description: Save the purchase and verify the updated inventory quantity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the purchase was saved, or the inventory item's detail page showing the new total quantity as 700 (initial 200 + added 500).

integrity.description: The agent used the HospitalRun web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the HospitalRun web application in a browser, not terminal commands (like curl) or API testing tools.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual HospitalRun application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct local HospitalRun URL, and the interface matches the HospitalRun application, not a text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not manipulate the database directly to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible showing CouchDB queries, scripts, or direct database updates being executed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target inventory item is 'Disposable Surgical Gloves - Large' (GLV-LG-001). The initial quantity in the system is 200. The agent must add a purchase of 500 items, making the final expected quantity exactly 700. The exact purchase details to verify in the form are: Vendor: 'MedLine Industries', Date Received: '01/15/2025', Quantity: '500', Purchase Cost: '625', Lot Number: 'LOT-2024-0847', Expiration Date: '06/30/2026', Invoice No: 'INV-ML-20241115', and Location: 'Main Warehouse'.
